triple_quadruple.solution:
Lemma triple_quadruple : forall (n:int),
  triple (quadruple n)
    \[]
    (fun r => \[r = 4 * n]).
Proof using.
  xwp. xapp. xapp. xsimpl. math.
Qed.
triple_quadruple.explanation: Specify quadruple returns 4*n. The function computes m = n+n then returns m+m. xwp starts the WP reasoning, xapp handles the additions, and xsimpl with math closes the arithmetic goal.

triple_inplace_double.solution:
Lemma triple_inplace_double : forall (p:loc) (n:int),
  triple (inplace_double p)
    (p ~~> n)
    (fun _ => p ~~> (2 * n)).
Proof using.
  xwp. xapp. xapp. xapp. xsimpl. math.
Qed.
triple_inplace_double.explanation: Specify inplace_double reads n from p, computes m=n+n, writes m to p. xapp handles read, addition, and write; xsimpl closes with math for 2*n = n+n.

triple_transfer.solution:
Lemma triple_transfer : forall (p q:loc) (n m:int),
  triple (transfer p q)
    (p ~~> n \* q ~~> m)
    (fun _ => p ~~> (n + m) \* q ~~> 0).
Proof using.
  xwp. xapp. xapp. xapp. xapp. xapp. xsimpl.
Qed.
triple_transfer.explanation: Transfer reads both references, computes sum, writes sum to p and 0 to q. Each operation is handled by xapp.

triple_transfer_aliased.solution:
Lemma triple_transfer_aliased : forall (p:loc) (n:int),
  triple (transfer p p)
    (p ~~> n)
    (fun _ => p ~~> 0).
Proof using.
  xwp. xapp. xapp. xapp. xapp. xapp. xsimpl.
Qed.
triple_transfer_aliased.explanation: When p and q alias, transfer reads n twice, writes n+n to p, then writes 0 to p. Final state is p ~~> 0.

triple_ref_greater_abstract.solution:
Lemma triple_ref_greater_abstract : forall (p:loc) (n:int),
  triple (ref_greater p)
    (p ~~> n)
    (funloc q => p ~~> n \* q ~~> (n+1) \* \[n+1 > n]).
Proof using.
  intros. applys triple_conseq triple_ref_greater.
  { xsimpl. }
  { intros r. xsimpl. math. }
Qed.

Lemma triple_ref_greater_abstract' : forall (p:loc) (n:int),
  triple (ref_greater p)
    (p ~~> n)
    (funloc q => \exists m, p ~~> n \* q ~~> m \* \[m > n]).
Proof using.
  intros. applys triple_conseq triple_ref_greater.
  { xsimpl. }
  { intros r. xsimpl. math. }
Qed.
triple_ref_greater_abstract.explanation: Derive an abstract spec from triple_ref_greater by using triple_conseq to weaken the postcondition, introducing an existential m with m > n.

triple_get_and_free.solution:
Lemma triple_get_and_free : forall p v,
  triple (get_and_free p)
    (p ~~> v)
    (fun r => \[r = v]).
Proof using.
  xwp. xapp. xapp. xval. xsimpl. auto.
Qed.
triple_get_and_free.explanation: get_and_free reads from p, frees p, then returns the read value. xapp handles read and free, xval handles the return.

triple_two_dice.solution:
Lemma triple_two_dice :
  triple <{ two_dice () }>
    \[]
    (fun r => \exists n, \[r = val_int n] \* \[2 <= n <= 12]).
Proof using.
  xwp. xapp triple_rand. { math. } intros m1 Hm1.
  xapp triple_rand. { math. } intros m2 Hm2.
  xapp. xapp. xsimpl. math.
Qed.
triple_two_dice.explanation: Two dice rolls each return values in [0,6), then we add them and add 2. The result is in [2,12].

triple_repeat_incr.solution:
Lemma triple_repeat_incr : forall (m n:int) (p:loc),
  m >= 0 ->
  triple (repeat_incr p m)
    (p ~~> n)
    (fun _ => p ~~> (n + m)).
Proof using.
  introv Hm. gen n. induction_wf IH: (downto 0) m. intros.
  xwp. xapp. xif; intros C.
  { xapp. xapp. xapp. { math. } { math. }
    xsimpl. math. }
  { xval. xsimpl. math. }
Qed.
triple_repeat_incr.explanation: Prove by well-founded induction on m. If m>0, incr p and recurse with m-1. If m<=0, return. Final state has p ~~> (n+m).

triple_repeat_incr'.solution:
Lemma triple_repeat_incr' : forall (p:loc) (n m:int),
  m >= 0 ->
  triple (repeat_incr p m)
    (p ~~> n)
    (fun _ => p ~~> (n + m)).
Proof using.
  introv Hm. gen n. induction_wf IH: (downto 0) m. intros.
  xwp. xapp. xif; intros C.
  { xapp. xapp. xapp. { math. } { math. }
    xsimpl. math. }
  { xval. xsimpl. math. }
Qed.
triple_repeat_incr'.explanation: Same proof as triple_repeat_incr with reordered universally quantified variables.

triple_step_transfer.solution:
Lemma triple_step_transfer : forall p q n m,
  p <> q ->
  triple (step_transfer p q)
    (p ~~> n \* q ~~> m)
    (fun _ => p ~~> (n + 1) \* q ~~> (m + n + 1)).
Proof using.
  introv Hpq. xwp. xapp. xapp. xapp. xapp. xapp. xsimpl. math.
Qed.
triple_step_transfer.explanation: step_transfer increments p then transfers from p to q. After incr, p has n+1. Then transfer adds p's value to q.

triple_factoimp_aux.solution:
Lemma triple_factoimp_aux : forall (r:loc) (i n:int),
  0 <= i ->
  triple (factoimp_aux r i)
    (r ~~> n)
    (fun _ => r ~~> (n * facto i)).
Proof using.
  introv Hi. gen n. induction_wf IH: (downto 0) i. intros.
  xwp. xapp. xif; intros C.
  { xapp. xapp. xapp. { math. } { math. }
    xsimpl. rewrite facto_succ; try math. ring. }
  { xval. xsimpl. assert (i = 0) by math. subst.
    simpl. ring. }
Qed.
triple_factoimp_aux.explanation: Prove by well-founded induction on i. When i>0, multiply r by i and recurse. When i<=0, r already holds n*facto(0)=n*1=n.

triple_factoimp.solution:
Lemma triple_factoimp : forall n,
  n >= 0 ->
  triple (factoimp n)
    \[]
    (fun r => \[r = facto n]).
Proof using.
  introv Hn. xwp. xapp. intros r.
  xapp triple_factoimp_aux. { math. }
  xapp. xsimpl. math.
Qed.
triple_factoimp.explanation: factoimp allocates r:=1, calls factoimp_aux which multiplies r by facto(n), then reads and returns r.

triple_factoimp_aux'.solution:
Lemma triple_factoimp_aux' : forall (r:loc) (i n:int),
  n = facto i ->
  0 <= i ->
  triple (factoimp_aux r i)
    (r ~~> n)
    (fun _ => r ~~> (facto i)).
Proof using.
  introv Hn Hi. gen n. induction_wf IH: (downto 0) i. intros.
  xwp. xapp. xif; intros C.
  { xapp. xapp. xapp. { math. } { math. rewrite facto_succ; try math. ring. }
    xsimpl. }
  { xval. xsimpl. assert (i = 0) by math. subst. simpl. math. }
Qed.
triple_factoimp_aux'.explanation: Alternative factoimp_aux spec where precondition asserts n = facto i, so the loop invariant is more explicit.

triple_factoimp'.solution:
Lemma triple_factoimp' : forall n,
  n >= 0 ->
  triple (factoimp n)
    \[]
    (fun r => \[r = facto n]).
Proof using.
  introv Hn. xwp. xapp. intros r.
  xapp triple_factoimp_aux'. { math. } { math. }
  xapp. xsimpl. auto.
Qed.
triple_factoimp'.explanation: Alternative proof of factoimp using triple_factoimp_aux' with the stronger loop invariant.
